Module 2: Your Launch Story
!
Executive Summary
!
Example of a Story
I remember getting an email back in the day. I printed it out immediately. It
was a 7-8 page long email that was actually a sales letter, called “turn your
computer into a money making machine”.
I had never heard of information products before, but I read the sales letter
over and over again. The product was $97 + S&H. At the time, I had very
little disposable income.
But when I saw this, I got a vision for a bigger life. I thought about having
control, and being able to support my family. Back then I was Mr. Mom
staying at home just taking care of the kids.
I looked around and saw others publishing, so I saw an opportunity for
myself in this industry. I made a decision to buy the course and learned the
basics of internet marketing and info publishing.
Today, 17 years later, I have now sold over $20 million in products.
!
!
!

Outline
• 	Did this story pull you in?
• 	Stories are incredibly powerful and will set you apart from your
competitors
• 	Turn your marketing into a story and always deliver your content this way
• 	This is how you really grab people, pull them in, and build anticipation
• 	Stories have been around since the beginning of time
• 	Stories are how we’ve always educated each other
• 	Stories are very sticky - meaning that people really remember them
• 	We believe stories and they drop our defenses
• 	You should be careful though - always be honest/truthful with your
stories
• 	To learn more about stories study Joseph Campbell’s Hero’s Journey
• 	All stories are about a protagonist seeking/desiring something and facing
a disaster/challenge along the way
In the next video you’ll find out what this has to do with your product launch
and business…
!
